title: Feature request: add a `df.tail_until(...)` method symmetric to head
body: I'd like to grab all rows from the end of a DataFrame until a predicate becomes false. There's no built-in for this; I currently do `df.iloc[::-1][predicate].iloc[::-1]` which works but is ugly. Could we add `df.tail_until(predicate)` as a convenience?

comments.body: I'd use this too if it existed.
FWIW the pattern works fine, why not just `df[df.iloc[::-1][predicate].iloc[::-1].index]`?
